title: Pabstiella crenata
taxonomy: Pabstiella crenata is classified as a species of orchid in the genus Pabstiella, which is a group of terrestrial orchids. It is a member of the family Orchidaceae and is native to South America. Within the Orchidaceae family, Pabstiella crenata belongs to the subfamily Epidendroideae. The subfamily Epidendroideae is further divided into several tribes, with Pabstiella crenata being part of the tribe Pabstiellinae. This tribe is characterized by its small to medium-sized orchids with distinctive flowers and growth habits.
